settings.disabledResolversHint: Comma-separated list of resolver names to disable
settings.resolversDescription: Control which message resolvers are enabled. Disabled resolvers will not process messages.

sync.resyncDescription: Clear data and resync all messages
sync.startSyncPrompt: The first synchronization requires authorization of Data Export in the Telegram client, and then refresh the page and try again.
sync.syncPrompt: After a synchronized conversation, you can search all chat records.
sync.takeoutInitFailedError: Takeout session initialization failed, please follow the guide

takeoutGuide.title: Data Export Authorization Required
takeoutGuide.description: Telegram has sent you a data export request. To start syncing, you need to:
takeoutGuide.step2: Find the data export request message from Telegram
takeoutGuide.step3: Click the "Agree" button to authorize data export
takeoutGuide.completionHint: After completing authorization, click the "Retry Sync" button below to continue
